title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Mastery Check
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a zero-diff formatting gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Formatter Choice evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Formatter Choice assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Order work so Formatter Choice has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
